# PyTorch backend dependencies (used by the pytorch-inference node via PyO3)
# Install into the project venv: ./launcher.sh --install
# worker.py shims removed names (e.g. SlidingWindowCache, LossKwargs) so
# older model code loaded via trust_remote_code=True works across versions.
# Pinned <4.54: models like TraDo ship auto-generated code from 4.52.4 that
# depends on internals (ROPE_INIT_FUNCTIONS["default"], LossKwargs, etc.)
# removed in 4.54+. The shims handle cache_utils and LossKwargs but not the
# deeper rope/config changes in 5.x.
torch
transformers>=4.52,<4.54
accelerate
protobuf
sentencepiece
